title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!
